backend/main.mo: Defines CMS content types, audition form types, and state maps/lists with authorization mixin and initial schedule setup.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries linking feature IDs to affected frontend files and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of numerous frontend files for documentation or tooling use.
frontend/index.css: Sets Tailwind layers and custom CSS variables for light/dark themes with horror‑styled color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app managing routes, sections, audio state, and QueryClient setup for the site.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Audio controller that loads looping sound effects, manages autoplay restrictions, volume, and start callbacks.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: Sound settings UI with mute toggle, volume slider, and optional autoplay unblock trigger.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays an access‑denied message for unauthorized users with a warning alert.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button handling Internet Identity auth flow with loading and error recovery.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting new authenticated users to enter and save their profile name.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable layout section wrapper with title, subtitle, icon, and styled container.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Footer with extreme‑haunt warning and attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Sticky header with navigation, logo, mobile menu, login button, and sound controls.
frontend/src/components/media/Fullscreen: Fullscreen video modal with autoplay support, close button, and playback/mute controls.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Shows audition perk cards listing food, training, and atmosphere benefits with icons.
Displays two audition cards (scare actor and dancer) with descriptions and buttons that trigger provided click handlers.
Dialog form for dancer audition submissions with login handling, validation, and mutation-based submission.
Dialog form for scare actor audition submissions with authentication checks, validation, and API submission.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Auditions page section featuring warnings, roles, images, and audition signup dialogs.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Renders a section showcasing an interior elevation image of Clown Town with a themed card, title, and descriptive horror text.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Displays a grid of food booths with images, pricing alerts, and navigation handling for booth details, including fallback logic for booth images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Lists haunted house attractions with images, taglines, descriptions, and wait-time info in a styled card grid.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Implements the home hero section with a background video, logo, promotional text, and a button that scrolls to the auditions section.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeInt: Provides an intro video section with autoplay handling, mute control, fullscreen support, error fallback, and an end-triggered audio effect.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Shows a procession preview with an image and description of the 6pm parade in a themed card.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Offers park information including hours, ticket types, and rules, organized into multiple styled info cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Renders a merch shop section displaying shop cards with names, items, and prices pulled from merchShops content.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Shows scare zones with images, taglines, and descriptions, using generatedImages for backgrounds.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Builds a grid of sneak-peek cards for selected haunted houses with images, descriptions, and navigation links.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Displays live show cards with optional images and a badge for haunt-season-only shows.
frontend/src/components/sections/Sliders: Implements a media slider supporting images, videos, navigation, fullscreen, and error handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Presents teaser cards for two upcoming 2027 haunted houses with names, taglines, and long-form teasers.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Simple teaser card announcing future content with a title and short message.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Displays upcoming event cards with images, dates, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Renders layered animated horror-themed background visuals including fire, smoke, chainsaws, blood, and tint overlays.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Provides structured content for multiple themed food booths, including descriptions and menu items.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Maps attraction, booth, show, and event names to generated image asset paths, including alias keys for compatibility.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Defines an array of haunted house entries with names, taglines, descriptions, empty subScenes, and no locations.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Provides a list of merch shops with names, item types, and prices plus a note about additional shops.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Exports several scare zone definitions including names, taglines, detailed descriptions, and null locations.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Contains metadata and a detailed description for the Schoolhouse haunted house sneak‑peek including image path.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Lists multiple show entries with descriptions and whether they are haunt‑season‑only.
frontend/src/content/slidersOfDecade.ts: Defines slider items for a decade‑themed media carousel plus title and subtitle strings.
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Provides upcoming event entries with descriptions, dates, and metadata for special one‑night events.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionSubmission: Defines hooks for submitting scare actor and dancer audition forms, mapping UI fields to backend formats.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Hooks for fetching the caller's user role, admin status, and user profile using the actor instance.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoplayVideo.ts: Hook handling video autoplay attempts, blocked‑autoplay state, errors, and manual play/pause controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Defines React Query hooks to fetch and mutate content items through an actor, including CRUD operations and category-specific queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Provides a hook to enter, exit, and toggle fullscreen mode for a referenced element with cross-browser support.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity context and provider for authentication using Dfinity AuthClient, exposing identity state and login/logout helpers.
Contains hooks to fetch and update the main haunt schedule and invalidate related React Query caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: Manages sound settings stored in localStorage, exposing preferences and setters for enabled and volume.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS layers, custom horror-themed color variables, fonts, and utility classes for the app.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Provides helper functions to format dates, content types, and type-specific fields for content items.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Renders a calendar view of content items with filtering, date grouping, hash navigation, and item details dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Displays a detailed sneak-peek page for the Clown Town haunted house using content and generated images. Includes a back button and styled card layout with image, title, tagline, and description.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Implements an admin CMS interface for managing content items and schedules with create, update, delete, and seed actions. Handles authentication, authorization, tabs, dialogs, and data fetching with multiple hooks.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Renders the Hell Hole haunted house sneak-peek plus an additional themed section for Vicky's Saw. Uses generated images and styled cards with descriptions and a back button.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Shows details for the Laser Hell scare zone, including image, location, tagline, and description, with fallback UI if missing. Includes navigation back to the scare zones section.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Displays a Schoolhouse sneak-peek page using predefined content with a large image, title, subtitle, and description. Provides a button to return to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Presents the Sharks Hell food booth page with image, booth info, and a detailed menu list. Includes scroll-back navigation to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Shows the Slider Doom food booth with image, description, tagline, and a rendered menu. Provides navigation back to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlaySneakPe: Renders a sneak-peek page for the Toys Come to Play haunted house using stored content and generated images. Includes a back-to-home button and styled content card.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Provides utilities to compare dates, iterate to the next date, and expand date ranges into daily string keys.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Implements helpers for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins for the frontend build.
project_state.json: Describes current project state, feature requirements, image needs, and version metadata for the haunted attraction app.
